case_title: NATIONWIDE MUTUAL INSURANCE COMPANY VS. WILSHIRE INSURANCE COMPANY

docket_entries.description: THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF NATIONWIDE MUTUAL INSURANCE COMPANY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WILSHIRE INSURANCE COMPANY $5,266.25 PRINCIPAL, $433.20 ATTORNEY FEES, $323.19 INTEREST, $300.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $6,322.64, SEE SCANNED DOC
